task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Calendar app in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen, showing the schedule or list of events.

task_completion.description: The agent accessed the 'Investor Update Preparation' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Investor Update Preparation' event is opened in a form view, edit modal, or selected in a list view.

task_completion.description: The location of 'Investor Update Preparation' is updated to the new conference room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location field for the 'Investor Update Preparation' event displays exactly 'Executive Conference Room - 3rd Floor'.

task_completion.description: The agent accessed the 'Budget Committee Meeting' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Budget Committee Meeting' event is opened in a form view, edit modal, or selected in a list view.

task_completion.description: The location of 'Budget Committee Meeting' is updated to the new conference room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location field for the 'Budget Committee Meeting' event displays exactly 'Executive Conference Room - 3rd Floor'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the updated events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save button is clicked, the events are displayed in read-only mode with the new locations, or the interface returns to the main calendar view after edits.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo GUI rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface being clicked and typed into, not a terminal or python script executing database commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Odoo application in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window shows the Odoo interface with the correct layout, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not change other event details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The event names remain 'Investor Update Preparation' and 'Budget Committee Meeting', and no other fields (like dates or attendees) appear to be modified in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating the location of two specific events in Odoo 17: 'Investor Update Preparation' and 'Budget Committee Meeting'. The old location was 'Board Room'. The new location must be exactly 'Executive Conference Room - 3rd Floor'. No other events should be modified, and no other details of these two events should be changed.
